description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage containing a build_project job that runs on macOS runners tagged xcode-10 and macos. In the job set formulaName to "simulator-recorder", set packageName from CI_PROJECT_NAME, set signIdentity first to "Developer ID Installer: Grigorii Entin (465NA5BW7E)" then to "Mac Developer", and execute ./Pods/GEContinuousIntegration/Scripts/build-gitlab-cmd "$PWD/build" "${packageName:?}" "${formulaName:?}" "${signIdentity:?}" XC_FABRIC_BUILD_SECRET="${XC_FABRIC_BUILD_SECRET:?}". Collect artifacts matching build/*.pkg, build/*.dmg, build/Formula/*.rb, and build/*.log.
